# harvester_resourcequota (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
# Harvester ResourceQuota limits VM snapshot sizes within a namespace.
#
# Note: Harvester enforces the resource name to be "default-resource-quota"
# (there is one ResourceQuota per namespace).
resource "harvester_resourcequota" "snapshot_limits" {
  name      = "default-resource-quota"
  namespace = "default"

  # Total snapshot size allowed for the whole namespace, in bytes (here 100 GiB).
  namespace_total_snapshot_size_quota = 107374182400

  # Optional: per-VM snapshot size quota in bytes, keyed by VM name (here 20 GiB).
  vm_total_snapshot_size_quota = {
    "my-vm" = 21474836480
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) A unique name

### Optional

- `description` (String) Any text you want that better describes this resource
- `labels` (Map of String)
- `namespace` (String)
- `namespace_total_snapshot_size_quota` (Number) Total snapshot size quota for the namespace in bytes
- `tags` (Map of String)
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))
- `vm_total_snapshot_size_quota` (Map of Number) Per-VM snapshot size quotas in bytes

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `message` (String)
- `namespace_total_snapshot_size_usage` (Number) Current total snapshot size usage for the namespace in bytes
- `state` (String)
- `vm_total_snapshot_size_usage` (Map of Number) Current per-VM snapshot size usage in bytes
